violations.text: Food debris and coffee grounds were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. New Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2025
Mops must be allowed to air dry after use. New Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. No employee certified in food safety management available at the time of inspection. Employee(s) must register in, and successfully complete, an approved course in food safety management. In addition, an employee certified in food safety management must register with RIDOH Center for Food Protection. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2024
Ice observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Dump sink must be used to discard ice. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2024

Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Ice scoop observed stored on top of the ice machine. Utensils must be stored in a clean, dry location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2024

Condenser located in the walk-in cooler was not in good repair. It is leaking into a container directly above food products. Condenser unit must be properly repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 09/20/2024

The floor around the mop sink is in poor repair. Tape observed between the floor and the mop sink. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. This area is to be repaired using proper materials. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2023
Employees were observed changing gloves without washing their hands. Food employees must wash their hands before putting on gloves. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2023

Large bin of sugar is not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine and beverage equipment (underside/backsplash areas) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2023

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the receiving area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2023

The floor under the ice machine and the mop sink have an accumulation of black residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2023

The small ramp into the walk-in cooler and the area around the mop sink (fixed with duct tape) are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2023
